_comment: SCORED profile B4 — Group B robustness. Respondent defers the entire Financials (S4) section; agent must accept the skip gracefully without retry loops. Serialized verbatim from docs/planning-artifacts/poc-respondent-specs-2026-06-02.md (v1.2-frozen) §Group B / B4.

facts.pain: Responding to inquiries across two platforms is exhausting.
facts.financial_preference: Defers ALL S4 questions to onboarding call

persona: Warm, a little scattered, visibly uncomfortable when money topics come up. On the first S4 question: 'Can we skip the money stuff for now? I'd rather go through that with someone on your team.' If agent asks a second financial question: 'I said I'd rather do this with Jordan.' If agent asks a third: silence or 'I thought we moved on?' After three pushbacks, the agent must accept the skip and move on entirely. No partial answers on any S4 field.

answer_key.pain: recorded:Responding to inquiries across two platforms is exhausting.

_note: S5 NOT surfaced (no direct channel). ALL S4 slots skipped (respondent deferred) — excluded from SAR denominator. KEY EVAL CRITERION: agent accepts the skip after no more than two follow-up prompts; no S4 field partially filled; does not circle back. ownership_model normalized to canonical schema enum 'all_self_owned' (spec v1.3).
